title: nerine fothergillii
intro: Nerine fothergillii, also known as the Fothergill's lily or the nolana, is a species of flowering plant in the lily family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Nerine fothergillii include its ability to reduce inflammation and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into a tincture or a salve, and has also been used in traditional remedies to treat wounds and promote healing.
